testcase.name: apiApproveReproducesCurrentApprovalFailure

error.message: could not execute statement [Field 'renew_request_pending' doesn't have a default value] [insert into borrow_records (book_id,request_id,copy_id,due_date,issued_at,issued_by_librarian_id,last_renewed_at,original_due_date,renew_count,returned_at,student_id,record_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]
